description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, insert pockets on the sides, panel detailing on the sides and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Line dryDo not ironDo not dry clean or wet cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryBuilt with breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike training shorts comes in a sophisticated body-friendly design. This high-performance short is created from Dri-Fit fabric to wick sweat away and keep you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with tees and performance shoes.
